title: cola praeacuta
intro: Cola praeacuta is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical West Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits associated with Cola praeacuta include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark and roots of Cola praeacuta are often used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
